description: Mr. Nodeley apologizes for another node-add in the same wave, sir. Three enriched corpus anchors meet the multi-phase parent-node threshold for Vegeta: BT1-066 Tenacious Vegeta (SS, Battle of Gods era), TB2-006 Vegeta Power Misused (Buu-Saga Majin), and BT2-063 Father-Son Galick Gun (Super Saiyan Blue, DBS Future Trunks Saga, dual-anchored with trunks). Completes the Saiyan-family-cluster trio of trunks + son-goku + vegeta started this wave. Hopes this is useful.
citations: [GameRant: Dragon Ball — Vegeta's Galick Gun Explained]
[ComicBook.com: Dragon Ball Super Dub Vegeta and Trunks Father-Son Attack]
[Son Goku parent-node precedent: cards/_characters/son-goku.md from this wave's E2]
